_comment: Tracked deprecations awaiting removal. The deprecation-reaper workflow reads this file weekly, looks up when each entry's PR merged (its exact mergedAt timestamp), and once mergedAt + grace has elapsed it opens/refreshes a tracking issue and pings the owners. Entries whose PR is not merged yet are ignored, so the clock only starts at merge. Remove an entry once its functions are deleted.

deprecations.description: Legacy matmul init API in tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/matmul.h: mm_init, mm_block_init, mm_init_short, mm_block_init_short, mm_init_short_with_dt, mm_block_init_short_with_dt, mm_block_init_short_with_both_dt, and matmul_tiles_math. Replaced by compute_kernel_hw_startup<SrcOrder::Reverse>() + the matmul_*_init API.

Legacy transpose compute API (transpose_wh_init / transpose_wh_init_short / transpose_wh_tile) deprecated in favor of compute_kernel_hw_startup() + transpose_init() / transpose_tile() in api/compute/transpose.h. Delete the whole api/compute/transpose_wh.h shim once all call sites are migrated.

Legacy in-DST transpose compute API (transpose_wh_dest_init_short / transpose_wh_dest) deprecated in favor of transpose_dest_init() / transpose_dest() in api/compute/transpose_dest.h. Delete the whole api/compute/transpose_wh_dest.h shim once all call sites are migrated.

pack_tile_block in tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/pack.h renamed to pack_block for a uniform op_block Compute API surface (tt-metal#47477). The pack_tile_block forwarding shim is retained only for backwards compatibility; delete it once all call sites are migrated to pack_block.

copy_block_matmul_partials in tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/tile_move_copy.h superseded by the uniform copy_block (functionally equivalent; same block unpack/datacopy paths) as part of the op_block Compute API surface (tt-metal#47477). The copy_block_matmul_partials forwarding shim is retained only for backwards compatibility; delete it once all call sites are migrated to copy_block.
